tools.name: search_apis
tools.description: Search across 484 endpoints in 75 APIs (cultural, earth, energy-calc, esg, green-path, harmonias, hydrogen, internal, nanosnap, natura, platform, sakurahub, science, sim, social, space, stocks). Returns matching endpoints with method, path, summary, parameters, and a ready-to-run example. Use this t

tools.name: execute_api
tools.description: Execute a request against any of the 75 registered APIs. Use search_apis first to find the correct api name and operationId. Requires 'Authorization: Bearer ppn_live_*'.

tools.name: environment_brief
tools.description: Environmental brief for one location: fans out to every public geo-aware API (weather, terrain, environment, …) and returns a merged JSON. Partial results come back with an errors[] list. Requires 'Authorization: Bearer ppn_live_*'.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "search_apis" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Search across 484 endpoints in 75 APIs (cultural, earth, energy-calc, esg, green-path, harmonias, hydrogen, internal, nanosnap, natura, platform, sakurahub, sci…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "execute_api" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
